programme.title: Harley Davidson And The Marlboro Man
programme.desc: Mickey Rourke and Don Johnson star in this four-lane genre collision of biker movie, heist thriller, buddy flick and sci-fi pic that will take you to the hardline of action and adventure! Co-starring Tom Sizemore, Chelsea Field and Vanessa Williams.

programme.title: The Mod Squad
programme.desc: Julie (Claire Danes), Pete (Giovanni Ribisi) and Linc (Omar Epps) are three problem teens headed to jail...until Captain Greer (Dennis Farina) offers them a deal to work for him and go undercover in the hip L.A. club scene. It’s a case that the cops can’t crack, but when Greer sends in his new task force – The Mod Squad – they quickly uncover a crime ring involving drugs, hookers...and dirty cops!

programme.title: Dillinger
programme.desc: Starring Warren Oates, Ben Johnson, Cloris Leachman and Richard Dreyfuss, this electrifying crime saga about one of the most notorious gangsters of the 1930's sets the screen ablaze with explosive shootouts, daring escapes and stellar performances.

programme.title: Mulholland Falls
programme.desc: In the 1950s, an elite squad of detectives becomes embroiled in a conspiracy and faces a secret the U.S. government is determined to keep hidden.

programme.title: Hoodlum
programme.desc: In New York of the 1920s, the black community of Harlem faces the same indignities as countless millions of refugees. Three rival gang leaders (Laurence Fishhburne, Tim Roth and Andy Garcia) battle for control of Harlem's urban power.

programme.title: Harsh Times
programme.desc: Christian Bale, Freddy Rodriguez and Eva Longoria star in this gritty look at friendship, loyalty and ambition set on the rough streets of South-Central Los Angeles as an ex-Army Ranger (Bale) attempts to come to terms with life after the military.

programme.title: Kalifornia
programme.desc: A couple (David Duchovny, Michelle Forbes) sets out on a cross-country trip to research a book about serial killers and, along the way, pick up an ex-con and his girlfriend (Brad Pitt, Juliette Lewis) who take them on a ride they'll never forget.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: Paul Walker and Jessica Alba heat up the screen as two divers who dream of finding hidden treasure.

programme.title: Dark Blue
programme.desc: When the LAPD's elite Special Investigations Squad (SIS) is assigned a high-profile quadruple homicide, veteran detective Eldon Perry (Kurt Russell) takes the case. Known for his tough street tactics and a fiery temper, Eldon also tutors rookie Bobby Keough (Scott Speedman) in the grim realities of police intimidation and corruption. While navigating the tumultuous neighborhoods of South Central L.A., Perry and Keough must track down the cold-blooded killers as well as face their own demons - demons that prove more ruthless than the criminals they pursue.

programme.title: Rush
programme.desc: Two undercover officers spiral out of control, becoming lovers and addicts as they infiltrate a local drug scene to bring down a supplier.

programme.title: The Mechanic
programme.desc: In this nail-biting action film, when an aging hitman (Charles Bronson) takes on an eager apprentice (Jan-Michael Vincent) they become an unmatchable team of killers...until the pupil's ruthlessness puts the two on a deadly collision course!

programme.title: Mr. Majestyk
programme.desc: Cinema tough guy Charles Bronson stars as Majestyk, an ex-con and Vietnam vet, whose efforts to run a farm are thwarted by narrow-minded locals and corrupt cops. But when a Mafia hitman destroys his crop, the farmer's fuse is finally blown.
